creator: bugs.freebsd.org@msqr.us
text:
Thanks Kevin, I understand your concerns about maintaining the older support. I do plan to migrate to Postgres 12 eventually. I was able to work around my immediate needs of maintaining updates for my Postgres 9.6/Timescale 1.7 systems via poudriere by using portshaker with a databases/timescaledb1 port on top of the standard FreeBSD ports tree, here: https://github.com/SolarNetwork/freebsd-custom-ports/tree/main/databases/timescaledb1. I think that will suffice while I make the transition to Postgres 12.

Do you think the current port should be updated so the USES does not include Postgres 9.6/10 anymore, here:

https://github.com/freebsd/freebsd-ports/blob/branches/2021Q1/databases/timescaledb/Makefile#L19

given Timescale does not support those versions?
